steps.title: Use the weed-control clue
steps.content: The sentence says weeds spread easily and become hard to remove completely. The blank must describe stopping or preventing that spread.

steps.title: Fit the verb to spread
steps.content: B means getting something back, C means preserving something, and D means feigning something; none fits controlling weeds. Halting means stopping, which matches stopping the spread of weeds. The answer is A.
